propositions: Removed config keys leave stale references across docs, CLI help text, and release notes that must be purged or corrected.
Active and reference documentation must contain zero live-configurable references to the removed keys.
Documentation describing now-hardcoded behaviors must no longer present them as configurable toggles while retained tuning params stay documented.
docs/config.md must match the pruned schema exactly with no removed keys listed.
CLI help and golden help fixtures must be regenerated to stay consistent with the pruned config.
Past-tense removal records in changelog/migration docs and historical ADRs are intentionally retained as the historical home.
